_comment: App Insights workbook JSON template. Scenario-agnostic by default: panels key off accelerator-wide telemetry events (response.returned, tool.hitl_*, cost.call, eval.result) emitted by `src/accelerator_baseline/telemetry.py::emit_event` and filter by cloud_RoleName so a partner can swap the scenario in accelerator.yaml without touching this file. Events land in the `traces` table (message=event.name, attrs in customDimensions) — see docs/customer-runbook.md Section 2 for the rationale. Partners rename the dashboard per engagement and add scenario-specific panels as needed.

panels.title: Successful responses per day
panels.kql: traces | where message == 'response.returned' | where tostring(customDimensions.ok) == 'true' | summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 1d)

panels.title: HITL approval rate
panels.kql: traces | where message in ('tool.hitl_approved','tool.hitl_rejected') | summarize approvals=countif(message=='tool.hitl_approved'), rejections=countif(message=='tool.hitl_rejected') by bin(timestamp, 1d)

panels.title: P95 request latency (s)
panels._note: Scenario-agnostic: filters by the accelerator's Container App role instead of a hardcoded route. Partners who want a per-endpoint breakdown add `summarize ... by name` once the scenario's endpoint path is known.
panels.kql: requests | where cloud_RoleName endswith 'api' | summarize percentile(duration/1000, 95) by bin(timestamp, 1h)

panels.title: $ per call (estimated)
panels.kql: traces | where message == 'cost.call' | extend cost = todouble(customDimensions.value) | summarize avg(cost) by bin(timestamp, 1d)

panels.title: Groundedness eval score trend
panels.kql: traces | where message == 'eval.result' and tostring(customDimensions.suite) == 'quality' | extend g = todouble(customDimensions.groundedness) | summarize avg(g) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
